title: "Advance "Set Date Automation
excerpt: I would like to request a feature that would allow you to have more advanced Assign Date Automation. Currently whenever you try to make an Automation with the “Set Date” Action it only allows you to set the date to today…

posts.author: Bherold (Burke)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to request a feature that would allow you to have more advanced Assign Date Automation. Currently whenever you try to make an Automation with the “Set Date” Action it only allows you to set the date to today. We currently have highly repetitive projects that can be more efficient if we can assign mass due dates based on Start and End Date columns. So allowing the input of other dates other than today would greatly improve this automation.

posts.author: Red-Rob (Rob Rothkopf)
posts.cookedHtml: I was looking for something related – being able to use a “Timeline” column and in an automation set the beginning or ending date, rather than having to use date columns individually.

posts.author: bmck097 (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I’m 100% in need of this. Using a formula to set another date works fine but then if you want to use that date in an automation it all falls apart…

posts.author: ElectricEthen (Ethen Roth)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree! It would be so helpful to have an automation to set a date to something other than JUST today.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bherold , @Red-Rob , @bmck097 , @ElectricEthen ,

We recently launched the app Special Automations - monday.com App Marketplace which has the required automation recipe for your use case (by using date columns).

image2090×366 27.1 KB

Also if you want any other automation, do let us know at support@superworkday.com

Thanks
